vulnerability.title: Ensure rsyslog-gnutls is installed
vulnerability.description: TLS protocol support for rsyslog is installed. The rsyslog-gnutls package can be installed with the following command: $ sudo dnf install rsyslog-gnutls
vulnerability.recommendation: Remediation script: # Remediation is applicable only in certain platforms if rpm --quiet -q kernel-core; then if ! rpm -q --quiet "rsyslog-gnutls" ; then dnf install -y "rsyslog-gnutls" fi else >&2 echo 'Remediation is not applicable, nothing was done' fi

triage_decision.reason: Installing the rsyslog-gnutls package provides TLS support for rsyslog, addressing the missing TLS protocol support identified in the STIG rule.
